title: Vocabulary Registry Schema
description: Canonical JSON schema for the world's vocabulary registry (lexicon). Maps stable content_ids to world-flavored names, aliases, localization hooks, and taxonomy classification. Content-independent — no game-system-specific vocabulary in field names.

VocabularyRegistry.title: VocabularyRegistry
VocabularyRegistry.description: Top-level vocabulary registry. Every mechanical ID in the content pack has exactly one canonical name in this world. Entries sorted by content_id for deterministic serialization.

schema_version.description: Schema version of this registry file (major.minor)

world_id.description: World identity hash — must match world_manifest.json world_id

locale.description: BCP-47 locale tag for this vocabulary (e.g., 'en', 'en-US')

naming_style.description: The naming style from the world theme brief (e.g., 'anglo_saxon_with_elvish', 'latin_technical')

entry_count.description: Total number of entries (for quick integrity check)

taxonomy.description: World-specific taxonomy tree. Categories and subcategories used for classification.

entries.description: All vocabulary entries, sorted by content_id

VocabularyEntry.title: VocabularyEntry
VocabularyEntry.description: A single vocabulary mapping: content_id → world-flavored name + aliases + localization hooks.

content_id.description: Content pack identifier (e.g., 'spell.fireball', 'creature.goblin'). Uses the mechanical_id namespace: domain.canonical_name.

lexicon_id.description: Deterministic stable ID: sha256(world_seed + content_id)[:16]. Used for cross-references.

domain.description: Vocabulary domain. Aligns with mechanical_id namespace domains plus world-specific domains.

world_name.description: Canonical world-flavored display name. This is the name the player sees.

aliases.description: Alternative names for this entry (e.g., colloquial names, abbreviations). Used for voice recognition and search. Sorted alphabetically.

short_description.description: One-line world-flavored description for indices and tooltips

article.description: Grammatical article for this name in English (for sentence construction). Null if no article.

plural_form.description: Plural form of world_name (e.g., 'Searing Bursts'). Null if same as singular.

localization_hooks.description: Structured data for future localization. Not translated — provides semantic anchors.

ip_clean.description: Compiler assertion that this name passes the Recognition Test (RQ-PRODUCT-001 §3). Must be true for all entries.

LocalizationHooks.title: LocalizationHooks
LocalizationHooks.description: Semantic anchors for future localization. Not translated text — structured data a translator can use.

gender_class.description: Grammatical gender class (for languages that require it)

syllable_count.description: Syllable count of world_name (for rhythm-matching in localization)

VocabularyProvenance.title: VocabularyProvenance
VocabularyProvenance.description: Provenance record for a vocabulary entry.

compiler_version.description: Version of the compiler that generated this entry

seed_used.description: The derived seed used for name generation (from lexicon_seed derivation)

content_pack_id.description: Content pack that provided the mechanical ID

llm_output_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the LLM output used for name generation (for determinism verification). Null if no LLM was used.

WorldTaxonomy.title: WorldTaxonomy
WorldTaxonomy.description: World-specific classification tree. Defines how abilities, creatures, and entities are categorized in this world's vocabulary.

categories.description: Top-level taxonomy categories, sorted by category_id

TaxonomyCategory.title: TaxonomyCategory
TaxonomyCategory.description: A single taxonomy category with optional subcategories.

display_name.description: World-flavored display name for this category

domain.description: Which vocabulary domain this category applies to (e.g., 'spell', 'feat', 'creature')

description: This schema defines the Vocabulary Registry: canonical world-flavored names, aliases, taxonomy classification, and localization hooks for every mechanical ID in the content pack. All names are generated at world compile and frozen. No copyrighted content.
